display_text: Riki Aghanim's Scepter: Tricks of the Trade — Counters enemy vision and detection by allowing Riki to hide inside an allied unit, providing mobility and extended burst potential. This transforms Riki into a mobile ambush unit that can reposition safely while enhancing his assassination tools.
search_text: Riki Aghanim Scepter anti-vision reposition mobility burst damage

display_text: Riki Aghanim's Shard: Smoke Screen — Counters physical damage dealers by reducing armor and isolating targets from ally assistance. This upgrade turns Riki into an area-denial specialist, crippling enemy carries and disrupting teamfight coordination.
search_text: Riki Aghanim Shard anti-physical armor reduction isolation disable
